skills.source: Join us as a Data Scientist with a solid background on time-series analysis for health monitoring applications and be a part of reshaping structural maintenance through innovative data-driven solutions.
Your expertise will drive data-driven structural assessment and contribute to the evolution of Irmos Technologies in our dynamic startup environment.
Develop and refine algorithms for automated feature extraction and anomaly detection from high-frequency time-series data.
Develop and refine algorithms for automated feature extraction and anomaly detection from high-frequency time-series data.
Build predictive models to estimate the remaining useful life of structures and detect early-stage structural degradation.

skills.esco_form: Estimate remaining useful life of assets
skills.source: Build predictive models to estimate the remaining useful life of structures and detect early-stage structural degradation.
Build predictive models to estimate the remaining useful life of structures and detect early-stage structural degradation.
Engineer robust anomaly detection algorithms to filter noise and handle non-stationary environmental effects in real-world sensor data.
Engineer robust anomaly detection algorithms to filter noise and handle non-stationary environmental effects in real-world sensor data.
Implement automated data validation and quality layers to identify sensor malfunctions, drifts, or data gaps before they reach the analytical models.
Implement automated data validation and quality layers to identify sensor malfunctions, drifts, or data gaps before they reach the analytical models.
Collaborate with Structural Engineers to 'close the loop' between data-driven insights and physical inspections/rehabilitation strategies.
Visualise complex health metrics to provide clear, data-driven insights for stakeholders and decision-makers.
Deep proficiency in Python and the scientific stack (NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, PyTorch/TensorFlow).
Deep proficiency in Python and the scientific stack (NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, PyTorch/TensorFlow).
Deep proficiency in Python and the scientific stack (NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, PyTorch/TensorFlow).
Expertise in Signal Processing (FFT, Filtering, Wavelets) and its application to time-history data.
Experience with SHM and predictive maintenance methodologies is a significant advantage.
Experience with SHM and predictive maintenance methodologies is a significant advantage.
Solid understanding of SQL/NoSQL and experience working with large datasets in cloud environments.
